steps.eval: for (const key of Object.keys(globalThis).filter((k) => k.startsWith('storyOrchestratorDebug'))) delete globalThis[key]; globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.setExtractionSettings({ enabled: true, profileId: 'afcc7073-3510-4f67-8070-35ce449d4792', cadence: 3, reconciliationMultiplier: 1.5, stabilityLag: 1 }); return true;

steps.send_generate: I pace around the chamber, idly tapping the walls.
I sit down on a fallen pillar and share some rations.
I ask about the weather back home to pass the time.
I whistle an old tavern tune and stretch my legs.
I check my pack again, counting the same supplies twice.
I doodle shapes in the dust on the floor with a stick.
I lean against the wall and close my eyes for a moment.
I flip a coin and catch it without looking.
I trace the mortar lines between the stones.
